articles.title: Green Lantern: The Cosmic Guardians
articles.content:
The Green Lantern Corps has been a staple of the DC Universe for decades, offering a blend of science fiction and superhero elements.

Here are some of the best Green Lantern comics to read:

1. Green Lantern: Rebirth (2004-2005) - A classic story that revamped the Green Lantern mythos.

2. Green Lantern: Emerald Dawn (1989) - A classic tale that explores Hal Jordan's origin story.

3. Green Lantern: Secret Origin (2008-2009) - A thought-provoking story that delves into Hal Jordan's past.

4. Green Lantern: The Sinestro Corps War (2007-2008) - A epic crossover event that pitted the Green Lantern Corps against Sinestro's army.

5. Green Lantern: The End (2006) - A poignant story that explores the aftermath of a Green Lantern's death.

Is the Green Lantern Corps ready for a new era of heroes?
articles.excerpt: Explore the best Green Lantern comics that showcase the cosmic guardians' epic battles and heroic deeds.
articles.seo_description: Discover the top Green Lantern comics that offer a blend of science fiction and superhero elements, from classic tales to epic crossovers.

articles.content: The newest Spider-Man villain is also one of Peter Parker’s oldest friends. Spider-Man has no shortage of villains in his rogues’ gallery, whether it be Green Goblin, Doctor Octopus, Vulture, Electro, or more. The latest entry to this criminal line-up, though, changes everything, as Marvel Comics is introducing a new villain who will change Peter’s relationships forever.

articles.content: Peacock's new releases for the week of March 23-29, 2026, feature a $334M sci-fi robot movie & more in this week’s Peacock releases. Premiering on March 24, 2026, The Wild Robot (2024), directed by Chris Sanders, is an animated adventure based on Peter Brown’s book. The movie follows ROZZUM (voiced by Lupita Nyong'o), a stranded robot who must navigate a new world. The film has received a 97% RT score and has been described as a 'must-watch' for fans of the sci-fi genre. Additionally, Peacock is also releasing several other movies and shows this week, including a drama series based on a popular true crime podcast.

articles.title: Dune 3's IMAX Visuals Needed New Technology, Denis Villeneuve Explains
articles.content:
Dune: Part Three is already set to be one of the biggest releases of the year, and will look unlike any other sci-fi film for one big reason. What did Denis Villeneuve say about Dune 3’s IMAX visuals? Speaking to The Hollywood Reporter, Dune: Part Three cinematographer Linus Sandgren revealed that he had lensmaker Atlas to create lenses that could capture the film's complex visuals.

Villeneuve explained that the standard IMAX cameras were not enough to capture the detail required for the film, leading to the development of new technology.

The new technology, which was a collaboration between Atlas and the film's production team, allowed the cameras to capture a wider range of colors and more detailed visuals.

This new technology will be a major factor in the film's success, and fans are eagerly awaiting the release of Dune: Part Three.
articles.excerpt: Denis Villeneuve reveals that standard IMAX cameras were not enough for Dune: Part Three, leading to the development of new technology.
articles.seo_description: Dune: Part Three's new technology allows for wider range of colors and more detailed visuals, making it a major release of the year.

articles.title: The Last of Us Season 3 Cast Adds Star Wars Star & 1 More, Roles Revealed
articles.content: Two more have joined the cast of The Last of Us Season 3. The Last of Us premiered on HBO in January 2023. Based on the popular video game franchise developed by Naughty Dog, the series’ first season follows Pedro Pascal’s Joel and Bella Ramsey’s Ellie as they travel across the United States in a post-apocalyptic world. The new additions to the cast are Alden Ehrenreich, known for his role as Hux in the Star Wars sequel trilogy, and another actor yet to be revealed.

articles.title: Invincible Season 4 Review – Prime Video’s Superhero Show Takes a Darker Path with Huge Payoff
articles.content:
In an era of superhero fatigue, Prime Video continues to dominate the modern comic book landscape via animated avenues. Season 3 of Invincible was lauded for blending an engrossing narrative, blistering action, and jaw-dropping brutality into an emotional rollercoaster event unlike any other on streaming. Mark Grayson (Steven Yeun) faced off against evil multiverse variations of himself, leading to an explosion of epic proportions. The aftermath sets the stage for the thrilling conclusion.

The show has always pushed boundaries and Season 4 is no exception, delving deeper into the darker side of the superhero world. The writing is sharp, the characters are well-developed, and the animation is top-notch. The action sequences are intense and the emotional moments are heart-wrenching.

Invincible Season 4 is a must-watch for fans of the superhero genre. The show takes risks and pays off in a big way. With its thought-provoking themes and engaging storyline, it's a wild ride that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the very end. Do we get closure on the Grayson family?
articles.excerpt: Prime Video's Invincible takes a darker path with Season 4, delivering a thrilling and emotional rollercoaster experience.
articles.seo_description: Invincible Season 4 takes a darker path with huge payoff, delivering a thrilling and emotional rollercoaster experience on Prime Video

articles.title: Project Hail Mary Review – Ryan Gosling’s Star Power Shines Bright in Unique Space Adventure
articles.content:
A film like Project Hail Mary (2026) almost needs no introduction. It’s an adaptation of Andy Weir’s 2021 best-selling novel of the same name, which has sold over two million copies, a return to live-action filmmaking by the creative duo behind the award-winning animated Spider-Verse franchise, Phil Lord and Chris Miller, and a star vehicle for Ryan Gosling. The movie takes us on a thrilling journey through space and time, where a lone astronaut navigates the complexities of his mission and the universe around him.

The film boasts stunning visuals, impressive action sequences, and a gripping narrative that keeps viewers engaged. Ryan Gosling shines in the lead role, bringing depth and nuance to his character. His portrayal is both captivating and relatable, making it easy to become invested in his journey. The supporting cast, including Jessica Barden and David Oyelowo, deliver solid performances that add to the film's overall impact.

One of the standout aspects of Project Hail Mary is its unique blend of science, adventure, and humor. The movie seamlessly weaves together seemingly disparate elements to create a cohesive and entertaining experience. Phil Lord and Chris Miller's direction is, as always, exceptional, bringing a level of creativity and energy to the project that is hard to match.

Project Hail Mary is a must-see for fans of space adventure movies and anyone looking for a thrilling and thought-provoking cinematic experience. With its talented cast, impressive visuals, and engaging narrative, it's a film that will leave you questioning the mysteries of the universe and wondering what lies beyond our planet.
articles.excerpt: Ryan Gosling shines in this unique space adventure from the Spider-Verse creators
articles.seo_description: Project Hail Mary review: Ryan Gosling's star power shines in this thrilling space adventure from Phil Lord and Chris Miller

articles.title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come Review – Samara Weaving and Kathryn Newton Effortlessly Lead a Superior Sequel
articles.content: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come (2026) is long overdue. The first Ready or Not film was monumental in the careers of those involved. A sleeper hit that gained audiences from all sides of the aisle, the 2019 horror-comedy put directors Matt Bettinelli-Olpin and Tyler Gillett, known collectively as Radio Silence, on the map. Their sophomore effort, Ready or Not 2: Here I Come, is an even more refined, razor-sharp, and wildly entertaining ride that benefits from the return of lead actress Samara Weaving as Grace Le Domas, alongside newcomer Kathryn Newton as Alex Le Domas. The film wastes no time in diving headfirst into the action, and the pacing never falters, as the duo expertly weave together suspense, dark humor, and style. With Weaving and Newton effortlessly trading off witty one-liners and intense moments of physicality, Ready or Not 2: Here I Come is a true tour-de-force. It's clear that the filmmakers have a deep understanding of what made the first film tick, and they've amplified every element to create something truly special. The result is a superior sequel that will leave you gasping for breath and begging for more.
articles.excerpt: Samara Weaving and Kathryn Newton lead a superior sequel in Ready or Not 2: Here I Come, a refined and wildly entertaining ride.
articles.seo_description: The highly anticipated sequel to Ready or Not, starring Samara Weaving and Kathryn Newton, is a refined and wildly entertaining ride.

articles.title: The Dark Inspiration Behind 97% RT Horror Movie
articles.content:
The most anticipated horror movie of 2026 has finally arrived, boasting a staggering 97% Rotten Tomatoes score. As fans and critics alike rave about the film's terrifying portrayal of the supernatural, many are left wondering: what drives this movie's unrelenting fear? The answer lies in a dark and twisted tale that inspired both this movie and one of Stephen King's scariest novels.

The story, which has been largely shrouded in mystery, follows a group of friends who embark on a journey to uncover the truth behind a series of gruesome murders. As they delve deeper into the mystery, they begin to realize that the lines between reality and nightmare are becoming increasingly blurred.

While the movie's plot may seem familiar, fans of Stephen King will recognize the eerie similarities between this film and his classic novel, 'The Dark Half'. Both stories explore the theme of duality, where the protagonist is forced to confront their darkest fears and insecurities.

With its heart-pounding tension and chilling atmosphere, this movie is sure to send shivers down the spines of even the most seasoned horror fans. But as the credits roll, one question remains: will you be able to sleep soundly knowing that the darkness that lurks within is always just a step away?
articles.excerpt: A new horror movie inspired by the same story as Stephen King's 'The Dark Half' has a 97% Rotten Tomatoes score.
articles.seo_description: A new horror movie inspired by Stephen King's 'The Dark Half' has a 97% Rotten Tomatoes score, leaving fans and critics alike on the edge of their seats.

articles.title: Reopening Hell's Kitchen: My Burning MCU Netflix Questions Before Daredevil: Born Again Season 2
articles.content: Ahead of Daredevil: Born Again season 2, I've got some big questions I'd like to have answered tied to the Netflix era of Marvel shows and beyond. Will we see Matt Murdock's return to Hell's Kitchen in the same state as when we left him in 2018? The city is still reeling from the aftermath of The Hand's invasion and the consequences of Matt's actions in The Defenders. With the Marvel Cinematic Universe expanding its reach into the streaming world, can we expect a crossover between the Disney+ shows and the Netflix series? And what about the other characters from the Netflix era, like Jessica Jones and Luke Cage? Will we see their return in some capacity, or will they be left behind in the dust of the MCU's growth?
articles.excerpt: The return of Daredevil: Born Again season 2 raises more questions than answers about the future of the MCU's Netflix era.
articles.seo_description: Ahead of Daredevil: Born Again season 2, we explore the burning questions tied to the Netflix era of Marvel shows and beyond.
